ground_truth.title: Exercise Equipment & Gym Machines
ground_truth.main_content: Fitness Equipment category page displaying multiple products including Echelon Row-S Indoor Rowing Machine with Rotating HD Touchscreen (Now $449.00, Was $799.00, $350 off), NordicTrack Commercial Series 1750 Treadmill (Members-only price, $500 off), Marcy 150 lb. Stack Home Gym (Now $374.00, Was $449.00, $75 off), Echelon Adjustable Dumbbells 752 Set with Stand ($399.98), Centr 150 lb. Dumbbell Weight Set with Rack ($379.99), Sunny Health & Fitness SMART Easy Assembly Folding Treadmill ($379.99), ProForm Carbon TLX Treadmill ($999.00 with $150 Sam's Cash Offer), Sunny Health & Fitness Premium Smart Treadmill with Auto Incline ($579.99), Marcy Folding Treadmill ($596.98 with $150 Sam's Cash Offer), and Marcy Neoprene Dumbbell Set ($34.98). Products feature star ratings from 3.9 to 4.9 out of 5 stars, with review counts ranging from 6 to 404. Filter options include Product Type, Brand, and Savings. Sort by Relevance available.
